source_pr.title: server: fix sub query error in prepare statement
source_pr.body: When prepare a statement with sub queries by api, TiDB will throw "transaction future is not set". This pr fix it. PTAL @tiancaiamao @coocood

symptoms: "select a from multiexec where b = ? order by b") (new_session_test.go)
failure_signature: "select a from multiexec where b = ? order by b") (new_session_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR is a server/prepared-statement correctness fix (subquery error). The case does not provide a flaky-test failure signature or a targeted stabilization change, so we avoid guessing a nondeterministic-order root cause category.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
